channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish not collected at designated pick up time leading to fly tipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Rubbish not collected by council at designated time (see time stamp 1340 on 2 May and 0140 on 3 May) leading to fly tipping on top of rubbish pile by passersby. Rubbish also presented in inappropriate bags.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatteraick Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd May
item.description:
Garbage on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin / possible foxes, 3rd May
item.description:
This bin is regularly overflowing, I think it’s just been replaced by a double bin this is the worst I have seen it! Maybe it needs emptying more regularly? Looks like there’s an issue with foxes pulling out rubbish to eat? Lots of dog poo bags as well, so maybe a separate dog waste bin next to it would be good?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hindmans Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on corner of Glenesk and Rochester under the light pole., 3rd May
item.description:
Dead fox is located just off the sidewalk on a major walk way that kids use to get to school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish spilt across street - now been there for 24 hours, 3rd May
item.description:
Please can this be cleaned up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Truman Road, 3rd May
item.description:
Loads of bags, sofa parts, flat pack bits left outside the flats again. Feels like you wonderful people collect it one day for more to be dumped the next. Thanks for all you do and how quickly you pick up!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30 Chesterfield Grove-Flytipping, 3rd May
item.description:
More items than what is pictured has been added and is on the pavement causing blockage to pedestrians. Need to be disposed appropriately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside flats, 3rd May
item.description:
Seems when tenants left 36 they left items outside flat. Overnight lots of other items left there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Polebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 44 Chesterfield Grove-Green waste on pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
The bag of green waste is on the pavement causing blockage to pedestrians. Need to be disposed appropriately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent littering in this location, 3rd May
item.description:
This has been happening weekly and has become a persistent problem. The same vehicle regularly stops by this green space and leaves litter behind in the public area after eating. I have attached photos of the rubbish. This appears to be an ongoing issue and would benefit from investigation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant damage to kerb and pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
This is significant damage to the kerb between the junction with Totteridge Lane and 1 Longland Drive (on the east / odd numbered side of the road) presumably from a vehicle, that is a safety hazard for pedestrians, particularly small children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Longland Drive, Woodside Park, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn over street, 3rd May
item.description:
Once again domestic and commercial rubbish is strewn all over the street on Vestry Road. This happens most week, please address the route issue of people dumping bags of rubbish on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76-80, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
